title: agrimonia eupatoria var. zeylanica
intro: Agrimonia eupatoria var. zeylanica, also known as Ceylon agrimony, is a variant of the agrimony plant that is native to Sri Lanka. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ceylon agrimony include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as aiding in the treatment of digestive issues and menstrual problems. It can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
